formulas.name: 1. Mass Percentage
formulas.formula: % w/w = (Mass of Solute / Total Mass of Solution) × 100
formulas.variables: Mass of Solute, Total Mass of Solution

formulas.name: 2. Molarity (M)
formulas.formula: M = (moles of solute / litres of solution)
formulas.variables: moles of solute, litres of solution

formulas.name: 3. Molality (m)
formulas.formula: m = (moles of solute / kilograms of solvent)
formulas.variables: moles of solute, kilograms of solvent

formulas.name: 4. E° cell for a cell in contact with pure electrolytes
5. Nernst Equation
formulas.variables: E, E°, R, T, n, F, Q

formulas.name: 10. Cell Potential of a Concentration Cell
formulas.variables: E, R, T, n, F, Q
